title: T-038 — Shift attribution helper: resolve active shift_id for line + timestamp
prompt:
# T-038 — Shift attribution helper

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.4 FR-08-E4-004, §16.4 V-PROD-19

## Goal
Implement reusable resolveActiveShift(lineId, timestamp) → shift_id helper that consults 02-SETTINGS shift_patterns and returns the active shift covering the timestamp.

## Implementation contract
packages/api-services/production/shift-attribution.ts: function resolveActiveShift(line_id: string, ts: Date): Promise<string>. Reads shift_patterns from 02-SETTINGS (active patterns for tenant), determines which window covers timestamp, returns shift_id. Returns null and logs warn if no shift covers timestamp (shift gap). Cache shift patterns 5min via in-memory cache. Add unit test for: (a) standard 3-shift coverage, (b) overnight shift wrapping past midnight, (c) shift gap fallback to null.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/shift-attribution.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/shift-attribution.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 3 shift_patterns A(06-14)/B(14-22)/C(22-06), when resolveActiveShift called with ts='10:00', then returns 'A'
2. Given overnight shift_pattern C(22-06), when called with ts='02:00', then returns 'C' (wrap-past-midnight)
3. Given no active shift_pattern covering ts (gap), when called, then returns null and warn log emitted

## Test strategy
- RED: unit test for 3-shift, overnight wrap, and gap before helper exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter api-services test shift-attribution'

## Risk red lines
- Do not return wrong shift on overnight wrap (V-PROD-19 audit drift)
- Do not skip in-memory cache (read every mutation = perf risk per §5.4)
- Do not modify shift_patterns table

pipeline_inputs.description: Resolve active shift_id for (line, timestamp). Handles overnight wrap. 5min cache.
pipeline_inputs.details: Reads shift_patterns from 02-SETTINGS. Window membership including overnight wrap. In-memory cache 5min. Returns null on gap.
out_of_scope: Do not implement shift management UI
acceptance_criteria: Given A(06-14)/B(14-22)/C(22-06), when called with 10:00, then returns 'A'
Given C(22-06), when called with 02:00, then returns 'C' (overnight wrap)
Given gap, when called, then returns null and warn log emitted
test_strategy: RED: unit test 3-shift + overnight + gap before helper exists
risk_red_lines: Do not misattribute on overnight wrap
